_comment: Form-up drag line width in LOOSE order (the issue's own report): a single Archers regiment (loose-order skirmishers) is staged alone (drill mode, no opponent), selected, then deployed with an RMB form-up drag right-to-left below it (start on the right so the computed deploy facing points south, away from the regiment). The preview line drawn during the drag -- and the file-count label over it -- must span the regiment's REAL loose-order width so the line the player draws is where the flank files actually stand once formed up. The drag is 240 wu long (about 14 files at the 18-wu loose pitch); the regiment then marches onto the line and reforms. Driven live through the real SelectionManager by tools/demo/DemoInputRecorder.gd; world coordinates; physics ticks (60/s).
